chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. Nos.D-1736 and D-1748 of 2025 Muhammad Ahmed & others AND Ayesha Ahmed Versus NAB & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 8634 & 8691 of 2025. 3. For hearing of main cases. Dated: 24.09.2025 Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan, advocate for petitioners in C.P. No.D-1736 of 2025. Mr. Ghulam Farooq, advocate for petitioner in C.P. No.D-1748 of 2025. Mr. Moazzam Abbasi, Special Prosecutor NAB. -.-.- Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has submitted categorically that still inquiry is going on against the petitioners and it has not been upgraded to investigation. He undertakes that no coercive action, including arrest of the petitioners, would be taken unless the investigation is completed and evidence is collected which results in filing of the Reference against the petitioners. After the Reference is filed, action in accordance with law will be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioners are satisfied and therefore these petitions are disposed if in the above terms along with listed applications. Judge Judge
